title: From an Egg -->Pakyura!
overview: Ichigo finally decides she has had enough of her step-father and wishes to change the past to bring her real father back.

title: Momoka's... --> Situation
overview: Ichigo discovers two new friends who decide to help her with her plans to get Miyuki (Mother) and Kyosuke(Father) together. Meanwhile it seems Miyuki has more than one admirer.

title: Cupid? --> A Great Battle!
overview: Ichigo sets up Kyosuke with Miyuki on a date at the zoo.

title: Big Wish! --> Come True?
overview: Kyosuke and Yuji confront each other about Miyuki. Whilst Ichigo decides she must confront Miyuki to bring her and Kyosuke together once and for all.

title: Warmth - Family!
overview: Everything comes together in the final episode
